mapper.sql: ci.comp_id, ci.comp_nm, ci.comp_rmk, ci.rgst_no, ci.corp_no, ci.rpst_nm, ci.zip_cd, ci.addrs1, ci.chrg_prsn, ci.tel_no, ci.biz_nm, ci.prd_amt, ci.up_comp_id, ci.del_yn,
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM fems.tb_comp_user cu LEFT JOIN fems.tb_comp_info ci ON ci.comp_id = cu.comp_id where 1=1 AND cu.user_id = #{createdBy} AND ci.del_yn = 'N'

SELECT
ci.created_at, ci.updated_at, 'U' cmd FROM fems.tb_comp_user cu LEFT JOIN fems.tb_comp_info ci ON ci.comp_id = cu.comp_id WHERE 1=1 AND cu.user_id = #{createdBy} AND ci.del_yn = 'N'
order by ci.comp_id
